_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT for get_trade_call after the additive TradFi hardening fields. ADDITIVE-ONLY change: indicators gains underlying_session (always) + funding_note (TradFi only). NO existing field removed/renamed (Data Integrity). outcome_return_pct / Phase-E outcome WR must NEVER appear (Data Integrity LAW).

new_in_this_wave.indicators.underlying_session: ALWAYS present. enum: OPEN_REGULAR | OPEN_EXTENDED | CLOSED_WEEKEND | CLOSED_HOLIDAY | ALWAYS_OPEN | PREIPO_INTERNAL | UNKNOWN
new_in_this_wave.indicators.funding_note: OMITTED for CRYPTO/UNKNOWN; present for EQUITY/KR_EQUITY/COMMODITY/PREMARKET
new_in_this_wave.indicators.funding_state: enum WIDENED: NORMAL | ELEVATED | EXTREME | FIXED_PREIPO (FIXED_PREIPO only for PREMARKET/pre-IPO symbols)

error_contract.INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES: {error:'INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES', error_code:'INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES', message, candles_available, candles_required, suggested_timeframes:[], suggested_action} — isError:true (NEW this wave)
error_contract.TRADFI_SYMBOL_UNSUPPORTED_ON_VENUE: {error_code, message, coin, requested_exchange, suggested_venues:[], probed_at} — isError:true (v1.11.1)
error_contract.TIER_LIMIT_REACHED: {code, error_code, message, current_usage, monthly_limit, tier, suggested_upgrade_url, retry_after_days} — isError:true (ACTIVATION-PAYWALL-W1)

cache_contract: no server-side response cache; computed per-call from live adapter candles + funding. underlyingType auto-detection cached 24h in-process (underlying-type.ts) with fail-open to static map.
consumers: src/scripts/seed-signals.ts (internal signal seeding; self-skips on InsufficientCandlesError)
src/lib/cross-asset-grid.ts (internal grid refresh; reads call+confidence only)
additive_only_rule: indicators may GAIN keys (underlying_session/funding_note) but never LOSE the 7 pre-existing keys; key order of the first 7 is preserved (funding_rate, funding_24h_avg, funding_state, ...). A removed/renamed key or a forbidden_key appearing = Data Integrity violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd /Users/tank/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run tests/integration/trade-call-tradfi-hardening.test.ts -t 'additive allow-list'   # asserts indicators keys == 7 pre-existing + underlying_session, no forbidden keys
live_probe_command: SID=$(curl -s -D- -o/dev/null -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"drift","version":"1"}}}' | tr -d '\r' | awk -F': ' '/^mcp-session-id/{print $2}'); curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H "Mcp-Session-Id: $SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H "Mcp-Session-Id: $SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_trade_call","arguments":{"coin":"BTC","timeframe":"15m"}}}' | grep -o 'underlying_session[^,]*'   # expect underlying_session present == ALWAYS_OPEN for BTC
